title: Best Friends Forever
logline: SpongeBob and Squidward finally become best friends after an unexpected act of kindness.

characters.name: SpongeBob
characters.description: Yellow square sponge with big expressive eyes, iconic holes, cheerful smile, optimistic personality

characters.name: Squidward
characters.description: Purple octopus with large eyes, cynical expression but secretly kind heart, plays clarinet

locations.name: Bikini Bottom
locations.description: Underwater town with coral reefs, bubbles, colorful sea life, Squidward's Easter Island head house

reference_notes: Squidward's character arc: from annoyed neighbor to grateful friend. Key moment is his subtle genuine smile - earn it through comedy.
